'''âr-ch-n''' ('''karachan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:eclose|eclose]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ch-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eclose|eclose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-ch-n
|-
! Lemma
| karachan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirachan|thirachan]] || [[word:jirachan|jirachan]] || [[word:shirachan|shirachan]] || [[word:kirachan|kirachan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurachan|thuthurachan]] || [[word:jujurachan|jujurachan]] || [[word:shushurachan|shushurachan]] || [[word:kukurachan|kukurachan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurachan|thurachan]] || [[word:jurachan|jurachan]] || [[word:shurachan|shurachan]] || [[word:kurachan|kurachan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurachan|thurachan]] || [[word:jurachan|jurachan]] || [[word:shurachan|shurachan]] || [[word:kurachan|kurachan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therachan|therachan]] || [[word:jerachan|jerachan]] || [[word:sherachan|sherachan]] || [[word:kerachan|kerachan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorachan|thothorachan]] || [[word:jojorachan|jojorachan]] || [[word:shoshorachan|shoshorachan]] || [[word:kokorachan|kokorachan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorachan|thorachan]] || [[word:jorachan|jorachan]] || [[word:shorachan|shorachan]] || [[word:korachan|korachan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorachan|thorachan]] || [[word:jorachan|jorachan]] || [[word:shorachan|shorachan]] || [[word:korachan|korachan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrachan|thĂŠrachan]] || [[word:jĂŠrachan|jĂŠrachan]] || [[word:shĂŠrachan|shĂŠrachan]] || [[word:kĂŠrachan|kĂŠrachan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharachan|thatharachan]] || [[word:jajarachan|jajarachan]] || [[word:shasharachan|shasharachan]] || [[word:kakarachan|kakarachan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharachan|tharachan]] || [[word:jarachan|jarachan]] || [[word:sharachan|sharachan]] || [[word:karachan|karachan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharachan|tharachan]] || [[word:jarachan|jarachan]] || [[word:sharachan|sharachan]] || [[word:karachan|karachan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharachan|sharachan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharachan|gosharachan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharachan|gokisharachan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharachanĂŒ|sharachanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharachanknĂŒ|gosharachanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharachanĂŒ|gokisharachanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharachanshĂ«|sharachanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharachankshĂ«|gosharachankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharachanshĂ«|gokisharachanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharachanro|sharachanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharachankro|gosharachankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharachanro|gokisharachanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharachanmu|sharachanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharachankmu|gosharachankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharachanmu|gokisharachanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharachansher|sharachansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharachanksher|gosharachanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharachansher|gokisharachansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharachang|sharachang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharachankng|gosharachankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharachang|gokisharachang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharachanya|sharachanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharachankya|gosharachankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharachanya|gokisharachanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharachanyam|sharachanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharachankyam|gosharachankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharachanyam|gokisharachanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharachanĂŒshĂ«|sharachanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharachanknĂŒshĂ«|gosharachanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharachanĂŒshĂ«|gokisharachanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharachanĂŒro|sharachanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharachanknĂŒro|gosharachanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharachanĂŒro|gokisharachanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharachanĂŒmu|sharachanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharachanknĂŒmu|gosharachanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharachanĂŒmu|gokisharachanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharachanshĂ«nĂŒ|sharachanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharachankshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharachankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharachanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharachanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharachanshĂ«ro|sharachanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharachankshĂ«ro|gosharachankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharachanshĂ«ro|gokisharachanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharachanshĂ«mu|sharachanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharachankshĂ«mu|gosharachankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharachanshĂ«mu|gokisharachanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharachanronĂŒ|sharachanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharachankronĂŒ|gosharachankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharachanronĂŒ|gokisharachanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharachanroshĂ«|sharachanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharachankroshĂ«|gosharachankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharachanroshĂ«|gokisharachanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharachanromu|sharachanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharachankromu|gosharachankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharachanromu|gokisharachanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharachanmunĂŒ|sharachanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharachankmunĂŒ|gosharachankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharachanmunĂŒ|gokisharachanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharachanmushĂ«|sharachanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharachankmushĂ«|gosharachankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharachanmushĂ«|gokisharachanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharachanmuro|sharachanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharachankmuro|gosharachankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharachanmuro|gokisharachanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
